GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_warehouse_name@0 ASC, i_item_id@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[w_warehouse_name@0 ASC, i_item_id@1 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[w_warehouse_name@0 as w_warehouse_name, i_item_id@1 as i_item_id, sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@2 as inv_before, sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@3 as inv_after]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
        GpuFilterExec: predicate=__common_expr_5@0 >= 0.6666666666666666 AND __common_expr_5@0 <= 1.5, projection=[1, 2, 3, 4]
          GpuProjectExec: expr=[CASE WHEN sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@2 > 0 THEN CAST(sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@3 AS Float64) / CAST(sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@2 AS Float64) END as __common_expr_5, w_warehouse_name@0 as w_warehouse_name, i_item_id@1 as i_item_id, sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@2 as sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)@3 as sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)]
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, i_item_id], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_name@0, i_item_id@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, i_item_id], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)]
                    GpuProjectExec: expr=[d_date@0 as __common_expr_2, inv_quantity_on_hand@1 as inv_quantity_on_hand, w_warehouse_name@2 as w_warehouse_name, i_item_id@3 as i_item_id]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, inv_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_date@1 >= 2000-02-10 AND d_date@1 <= 2000-04-10

                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[inv_date_sk@1 as inv_date_sk, inv_quantity_on_hand@2 as inv_quantity_on_hand, w_warehouse_name@3 as w_warehouse_name, i_item_id@0 as i_item_id]
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, inv_item_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 4, 5]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(w_warehouse_sk@0, inv_warehouse_sk@2)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5]

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=4032
